title: Weather: Fire danger warning for Beaufort West region
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the Nama Khoi, Khai-Mai and Hantam municipalities in the Northern Cape and Beaufort West municipality on Wednesday 3 September, according to the SA Weather Service.


> Regional weather service:


Western CapeMorning fog patches in places, otherwise fine and cool, but warm in places along the West Coast and adjacent interior. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong west to north-westerly, but light to moderate westerly to south-westerly from Cape Point to Plettenberg Bay.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool along the coast with light morning rain between Plettenberg Bay and Jeffreys Bay, otherwise fine and warm. The wind along the coast will be strong south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool along the coast, otherwise fine and warm. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures for today:



> Extended forecast on Thursday 4 September:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
